prompt: An abstract top-down view of a bottling conveyor belt. 67% of the bottles are perfect and glowing; the remaining 33% are crushed and turning into dark sand. The sand is shaped like human handprints. Minimalist composition, industrial color palette of steel blue and safety orange. High emotional impact, professional magazine cover style.
metaphor: Glowing bottles represent 67% efficiency; handprint-shaped sand represents the dominant 33% loss caused by manual errors versus systemic machine failure.
